title: Malty Aerated Australian Renkon Stew
description: A rich and savory Australian stew featuring lotus root, sautéed with a hint of malted barley. This dish can be enjoyed at any time of day, but pairs well with a warm dinner.
instructions: Brown the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced renkon and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the beef broth, red wine, tomato paste, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Stir to combine, then bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the renkon is tender.
Remove the lid and simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until the stew has thickened slightly.
Stir in the malted barley and cook for 2 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
